title: Beehiiv Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is Beehiiv worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: Beehiiv Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: Beehiiv is the newsletter platform built for growth that positions itself for newsletter publishers and media operators. Founded in 2021, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: Beehiiv is a solid choice for newsletter publishers and media operators. Its free tier is genuinely useful. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for newsletter publishers and media operators
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: Beehiiv offers a free plan, with paid plans from $39/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: Beehiiv works best for newsletter publishers and media operators. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well. If you need something different, check the alternatives section.

faq.a: Yes, Beehiiv has a free plan supporting up to 2500 subscribers. This makes it accessible for new senders testing the platform.

faq.q: What is Beehiiv best used for?
faq.a: Beehiiv is best for newsletter publishers and media operators. Its standout features include newsletter monetisation, ad network, referral program, which suit this use case well.
Beehiiv is generally beginner-friendly. The interface is straightforward for basic campaigns, though advanced automation features have a learning curve.

faq.q: Does Beehiiv have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, Beehiiv runs an affiliate program paying 50% first year. This is worth considering if you plan to recommend the platform to your audience.
